name: Dracotail Flame
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>星辰の吼炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ドラゴンテイル・フレイム</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 face-up Spell on the field; negate its effects (until the end of this turn), then you can place 1 "Dracotail" card from your GY or banishment on the bottom of the Deck, except "Dracotail Flame", then draw 1 card. You can only activate 1 "Dracotail Flame" per turn.
eff: Target 1 face-up Spell on the field; negate its effects (until the end of this turn), then you can place 1 "Dracotail" card from your GY or banishment on the bottom of the Deck, except "Dracotail Flame", then draw 1 card. You can only activate 1 "Dracotail Flame" per turn.

action: Places cards from the player's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
Places the player's banished cards on the bottom of the Deck
mst: Negates the effects of Spell Cards
